title: LeetCode Dashboard
description: A dashboard for tracking LeetCode progress with stats, streaks, and problem breakdowns.

title: AI Chat Wrapper
description: A custom interface for interacting with large language models, with conversation history and prompt templates.

title: Interactive Data Explorer
description: A D3.js visualization that lets users explore and filter multidimensional datasets interactively.

title: Climate Trends Visualization
description: Animated charts showing temperature and precipitation trends over the last century.
